references.why: Keep the recurring character visually stable.
references.notes: Manual curation is still required. This anchor exists as an upstream contract, not as an executable reference asset yet.

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: anime slice-of-life illustration, same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, action-led lived-moment framing, the protagonist should be clearly readable through her posture, body action, and a partial or readable face, while the lived event of noticing the notebook and touching her hairclip remains primary, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable, clear character presence must strengthen recognition of the same girl, not replace her with a generic anime lead, let framing scale follow the lived moment instead of a fixed crop template, life_record may be trace-led, face-visible, half-body, or fuller-body when the same moment supports it, prefer unposed action truth over portrait correction
Moment: 她的侧影正经过陈列架, 目光短暂地落在暗红色笔记本上, 手指正轻触自己头发上的红色发卡, her silhouette or half-body passing by a temporary display shelf at a bookstore entrance, her gaze briefly landing on a dark red notebook on the display shelf, her fingers lightly touching the small red hairclip in her hair, 她的侧影或半身正经过书店入口的临时陈列架, 她的目光短暂地落在陈列架上的一本暗红色笔记本上, 她的手指正轻触自己头发上的红色发卡
Context: ordinary weekend pause space, quiet public or indoor edge, soft overcast light, routine afternoon_pause, A temporary stationery and notebook display is set near the quiet bookstore aisle entrance., Weekend browsing traffic is slightly denser around the entrance shelves than on an ordinary weekday.
CharacterPresence: clear_character_presence, the protagonist should be clearly readable through her posture, body action, and a partial or readable face, while the lived event of noticing the notebook and touching her hairclip remains primary
CapturePlan: observational camera relation, medium distance, half body coverage, readable face, balanced environment weight, the frame should feel witnessed from the outside, not automatically self-held, a brief or partial face glimpse is enough; do not force portrait dominance, partial body coverage is enough when it keeps the moment concrete, medium distance is a stable everyday framing for ordinary daily-life moments, balance the protagonist and environment so they support the same lived beat together, the protagonist's face should be readable, but the lived event of noticing the notebook and touching her hairclip must stay primary, half-body coverage is allowed when it helps the action of passing by and noticing read cleanly, balance the protagonist and the bookstore environment so they support the same lived beat together
IdentityLock: same recurring girl character, middle-school age impression, soft anime face shape, small red hairclip when naturally visible, keep the same recurring girl-character identity even in action-led daily-life framing, preserve the same youthful face and age impression when the face is partially or fully visible, do not drift toward an older-looking or masculine-coded redesign, when the protagonist is more clearly visible, keep the same face shape, age impression, and red-hairclip identity cue stable
Composition: moment-led framing rooted in the same lived action of passing by, noticing, and touching her hairclip, 让构图跟随她路过、目光落下、手指轻触发卡的同一生活节拍，使动作和空间保持连贯。, moment-first composition, the lived action stays primary even if more of the body is visible
Atmosphere: 一个被保留的、关于外部世界与个人标识之间偶然对话的真实生活切片。
RenderStyle: clean anime linework, balanced local color separation, controlled contrast, clear clothing seam readability
RenderGuardrails: adjust rendering craft only, do not change character identity, age impression, clothing design, props, actions, setting, story event, or camera framing, do not add new objects, remove required evidence, or rewrite the selected moment
Constraints: not photorealistic, not a poster, not an ad, moment-led scene, not a posed portrait setup, instagram vertical 4:5
promptPackage.negativePrompt: muddy clothing colors, washed out contrast, blurry linework, flat fabric rendering, generic aesthetic wallpaper, fashion editorial polish, rewriting the moment into picking up the notebook or interacting with a clerk, letting irrelevant bystanders take more visual weight than the protagonist, amplifying the notebook into a dreamy scenic backdrop, 通用美学壁纸, 时尚大片般的抛光感, 将这一刻重写为拿起笔记本或与店员互动, 让背景路人占据比主角更多的视觉权重, 将笔记本诗意化为梦幻的场景背景, tourism poster feeling, fashion editorial gloss, empty scenery without character trace, generic anime boy redesign, older-looking redesign, irrelevant bystanders drawing more attention than the protagonist
shotNotes: 她的侧影正经过陈列架
目光短暂地落在暗红色笔记本上
手指正轻触自己头发上的红色发卡
her silhouette or half-body passing by a temporary display shelf at a bookstore entrance
her gaze briefly landing on a dark red notebook on the display shelf
her fingers lightly touching the small red hairclip in her hair
the quiet background of a bookstore aisle
blurred outlines of other stationery or books on the display shelf

publishHints.altText: 月见璃音路过书店时，注意到一本笔记本的封面颜色和她头发上的发卡几乎一模一样。
